about.title: About MD Builders
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Construction Partner in Gauteng
about.heroSubtitle: Building trust, one project at a time across Gauteng Province

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Founded by Meshack Dlamini, MD Builders has been serving the Gauteng community for over 15 years. What started as a small construction business has grown into one of the most trusted names in residential and commercial construction across Johannesburg, Pretoria, and surrounding areas.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To provide exceptional construction services that exceed our clients' expectations while maintaining the highest standards of quality, safety, and professionalism. We believe in building lasting relationships through honest communication and superior workmanship.

items.title: Quality First
items.description: We never compromise on quality. Every project receives our full attention to detail and commitment to excellence.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: Our clients can count on us to deliver projects on time and within budget, every time.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: Honest pricing, transparent communication, and ethical business practices guide everything we do.

items.title: Safety
items.description: We maintain the highest safety standards to protect our team, clients, and their properties.

serviceAreas.title: Service Areas

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common Questions About Our Construction Services
faq.heroSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our services

items.question: Do you provide free quotes?
items.answer: Yes, we provide free, no-obligation quotes for all our services. Simply contact us with your project details and we'll schedule a convenient time to assess your needs.

items.question: What areas do you service?
items.answer: We service all areas across Gauteng Province, including Johannesburg, Pretoria, East Rand, West Rand, and surrounding areas. Contact us to confirm coverage for your specific location.

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Yes, MD Builders is fully licensed and insured. We carry comprehensive liability insurance to protect both our clients and our team during all projects.

items.question: How long do projects typically take?
items.answer: Project timelines vary depending on scope and complexity. Small repairs may take 1-2 days, while larger construction projects can take several weeks. We provide detailed timelines with every quote.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept cash, bank transfers, and card payments. For larger projects, we typically require a deposit to begin work, with the balance due upon completion.

items.question: Do you offer warranties on your work?
items.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties. Warranty periods vary by service type, and we'll provide full warranty details with your quote.

items.question: Do you supply materials or do I need to purchase them?
items.answer: We can supply all materials as part of our service, or work with materials you've purchased. We'll advise on the best approach based on your project and budget.

items.question: Can you work on weekends or evenings?
items.answer: Yes, we offer flexible scheduling including weekend and evening work for urgent projects or client convenience. Additional charges may apply for after-hours work.

items.question: Do you handle emergency repairs?
items.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency repair services for urgent issues like burst pipes, electrical problems, or structural damage. Contact us immediately for emergency assistance.

stillHaveQuestions.title: Still Have Questions?
stillHaveQuestions.subtitle: Don't hesitate to reach out - we're here to help!

about.experience: From small home repairs to large construction projects, we deliver exceptional results that stand the test of time.
